message:
chore(act_runner): drop dead scp_output assignment in local-host failure path

Self-review of d490f5f: the local-host cp-failure branch set scp_output
to a string that's never read after the loop (the variable is declared
local per iteration and only consumed for the diagnostic echo, which
uses $copy_src directly). Leftover from mirroring the structure of the
pre-fix branch, which set scp_output as a sentinel before running `false`
to propagate an error exit. Drop it for clarity.

No behavior change; all 285 unit tests still pass, end-to-end run
against beads_viewer still produces 3 correctly-targeted archives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1970,7 +1970,6 @@ act_run_native_build() {
                     fi
                     local_artifact_paths+=("$this_artifact_path")
                 else
-                    scp_output="failed to copy local artifact from $copy_src"
                     _log_error "Failed to copy artifact $bin from local host ($copy_src)"
                     echo "Local cp failed for $bin: $copy_src" >> "$log_file"
                     download_failed=true
